/// Chat subsystem (global chat, direct messaging, presence, tickets, raw gossip).
pub mod chat;

/// Echo protocol handler used to probe/bootstrap nodes.
pub mod echo;

/// Global matchmaker: bootstrapping, global chat, and periodic maintenance.
pub mod global_matchmaker;

/// Main P2P node: router, gossip, direct messaging, and chat.
pub mod main_node;

/// Single entry point owning all running network code (matchmaker + rooms).
pub mod network_manager;

/// Interruptible sleep / wake-up helper.
pub mod sleep;

/// User/node identities, keys, nicknames, and colors.
pub mod user_identity;
